features: LYNX Jungle Fresh Duo Gift Set includes a full-size LYNX Jungle Fresh Body Wash 225 ml and Body Spray 150 ml
Brings him energy and a zest for life with a revitalising palm leaf and amber fragrance
The body wash washes away odour-causing bacteria, giving his skin a fresh and clean feel
The body spray features even more odour-busting zinc technology to give him 48 hours of all-over freshness
Perfect for any occasion, these gifts for him are the ultimate Father’s Day present, secret Santa surprise or all-year-round gift
Our gift set is wrapped and ready to gift – just remove the sleeve for a perfect present for him that will always hit the spot
description: Product Description So, it’s gift-giving time again. The age-old question, ‘What will I get him?’ Relax. The answer’s simple. Time to take the guesswork out of getting it right and grab the LYNX Jungle Fresh Duo Gift Set. Teaming full-size LYNX Jungle Fresh Body Wash and Body Spray together, this set of gifts for him has got him covered with an invigorating palm leaf and amber scent. The body wash kicks odour to the kerb and leaves him smelling irresistibly fresh for up to 12 hours. Plus, it contains moisturisers to hydrate his skin every time he showers. With just a few spritzes of our men's deodorant, he’ll have 48 hours of freshness and unbeatable confidence. We’re out here working smarter, not harder, with an aluminium-free formula that boasts even more odour-busting zinc technology than before. Packaged in a box that’s ready to gift, these gifts for men will help him stay at the top of his game and have the confidence to be the best version of the only thing he can be: himself.  Son, brother, husband, dad, uncle, cousin… whoever you’re buying for, there’ll be no fake smiles or eye rolling when he opens this one because he’ll actually like it. And use it. And every time he does, he’ll remember the great gift you gave him. Probably. The point is, we know guys want to smell good and that’s why our gift sets always hit the spot. Ingredients LYNX JUNGLE FRESH BODYSPRAY 150ML INGREDIENTS: Alcohol Denat., Butane, Isobutane, Propane, Parfum, Zinc Neodecanoate, Isopropyl Myristate, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Citral, Citrus Aurantium Peel Oil, Coumarin, Eugenol, Geraniol, Limonene, Linalool, Linalyl Acetate, Pelargonium Graveolens Flower Oil, Pinene, Sclareol, Terpineol, Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes. LYNX JUNGLE FRESH BODYWASH 225ML INGREDIENTS: Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Glycerin, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Parfum, Sodium Benzoate, Citric Acid, Lactic Acid, Disodium EDTA, PPG-6, Saccharide Isomerate, Limonene, CI 19140, CI 42090 Directions For the LYNX Jungle Fresh Body Wash: Wet skin, apply a generous amount to a washcloth or loofah, lather, and massage into skin. Rinse thoroughly. For the LYNX Jungle Fresh Body Spray: Hold can 6-8 inches away from body and spray evenly. Do not apply to face or eyes. Use daily for best results. Safety Warning LYNX JUNGLE FRESH BODYSPRAY 150ML DIRECTIONS: Shake well, hold can 15cm from the underarm and spray. CAUTION: Do not use on broken skin. Stop use if rash or irritation occurs. Avoid direct inhalation. Use in short bursts in well-ventilated places, avoid prolonged spraying. Do not spray near eyes. Use only as directed. LYNX JUNGLE FRESH BODYWASH 225ML Shower Gel & Body and Face Wash & Body Scrubs Avoid contact with eyes. If contact occurs, rinse thoroughly with water. Manufacturer Contact Information Unilever Dept ER, Wirral CH63 3JW UK See more
